creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
This is the update for devell/ruby-gems to 0.9.1 which fixes a security problem. See more at http://www.derkeiler.com/Mailing-Lists/securityfocus/bugtraq/2007-01/msg00598.html

Fix: 

Install the patch: 

http://blog.innerewut.de/files/ruby-gems.0.9.1.patch
How-To-Repeat: Install the patch from http://blog.innerewut.de/files/ruby-gems.0.9.1.patch
